articles.value: The Top 10 Most Played Prowess Cards in Commander
articles.excerpt: Creatures with prowess find a home in a lot of Spellslinger decks. With Secrets of Strixhaven coming up, they may be even more relevant.
In this latest Top 40 list, Cooper dives into the most popular commanders on EDHREC that you can play for just two mana.

container.description: Popular decks and cards for Baral, Chief of Compliance
container.title: Baral, Chief of Compliance (Commander) - Optimized
